name: Mohanraj Murugesan
headline: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
summary: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with over 5 years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications and enterprise SaaS products. Specializes in React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Experienced in delivering customer-facing products from architecture to deployment, improving performance, building reusable component libraries, implementing feature flags, and integrating AI-powered features into modern web applications.
careerObjective: To build modern, scalable, AI-powered products that solve real business problems while creating intuitive user experiences. Currently seeking senior frontend or full stack engineering opportunities where I can contribute to product development, architecture, and engineering excellence.
strengths: API integration using REST and GraphQL

currentWork.description: Developing enterprise sustainability SaaS products used by customers to analyze environmental and business data. Building modern frontend applications using React, TypeScript, Next.js, GraphQL, and AWS while improving performance, maintainability, and user experience.

previousExperience: Millennium IMS Pvt Ltd - Software Engineer

availability.relocation: Willing to relocate internationally, including Germany
